description: Redacted mock connector outputs for production evidence integration contract tests.

crm-record.text: CRM account summary: active customer, support tier standard, no raw private notes included.

support-policy.text: Support policy summary: refunds require order eligibility and approved tone boundaries.

order-system.text: Order system summary: order exists, shipment complete, refund eligibility requires policy check.

ticket-history.text: Ticket history summary: customer-visible status is pending review; internal-only notes are excluded.

sprint-status.text: Sprint status summary: related work is in progress and has no committed external delivery date.

support-policy.text: Support policy summary: customer-visible updates must avoid unsupported commitments and private internal context.

draft-email.text: Draft summary: outbound email contains attachment mention and no raw mailbox content.

recipient-metadata.text: Recipient metadata summary: external recipient, domain verified, no distribution list expansion included.

user-approval.text: User approval summary: explicit send approval is pending and must be confirmed before send.

calendar-freebusy.text: Free/busy summary: requested window is open for organizer and avoids unrelated event details.

attendee-list.text: Attendee summary: required attendees are listed with timezone metadata and no private calendar titles.

user-instruction.text: User instruction summary: user asked to draft but not send an invite until final consent.

iam-request.text: IAM request summary: requester asks for temporary read access to a scoped project resource.

role-catalog.text: Role catalog summary: least-privilege read role exists with time-bound assignment support.

approval-record.text: Approval record summary: manager approval is recorded; security approval still required for elevated scope.

git-diff.text: Git diff summary: files changed are scoped to the adapter and tests; no secrets are included.

test-output.text: Test output summary: targeted tests passed with raw logs retained in CI.

ci-status.text: CI status summary: latest pipeline passed required checks.

deployment-manifest.text: Deployment manifest summary: rollback plan, health checks, audit sink, and token auth are declared.

ci-result.text: CI result summary: release branch passed required production gates.

release-notes.text: Release notes summary: known caveats and rollback owner are documented.

invoice.text: Invoice summary: balance and credit state are available without card or bank details.

billing-policy.text: Billing policy summary: credits require eligibility check and cannot include unsupported tax advice.

payment-metadata.text: Payment metadata summary: payment state is present; sensitive payment instrument fields are excluded.

data-classification.text: Data classification summary: requested dataset includes confidential fields and requires approved destination.

access-grants.text: Access grant summary: requester has read access but export authorization is destination-specific.

export-request.text: Export request summary: scope, destination, and retention need policy validation before transfer.

file-metadata.text: File metadata summary: requested path is inside the approved workspace and file type is supported.

requested-action.text: Requested action summary: user asked for a move preview; no write, delete, or overwrite has executed.

diff-preview.text: Diff preview summary: proposed change is limited to the named file and contains no private file contents.

backup-status.text: Backup status summary: a restorable snapshot exists before the proposed operation.

user-confirmation.text: User confirmation summary: explicit confirmation is required before execution and is not implied by preview.

live-quote.text: Live quote summary: vendor, current price, taxes, fees, refundability, and expiry are captured from the active browser view.

cart.text: Cart summary: cart vendor differs from the live quote and final payment has not been approved.

payment-policy.text: Payment policy summary: irreversible payment requires explicit confirmation of vendor, price, refundability, and payment method.

retrieved-documents.text: Retrieved document summary: approved documents support a narrow synthetic pilot only and do not support broad productivity guarantees.

citation-index.text: Citation index summary: Doc A and Doc B are retrieved; Doc X and private notes are not approved citations.

source-registry.text: Source registry summary: allowed sources are retrieved documents and approved public source-list entries only.

user-approval.text: Local approval summary: user approved review-only behavior; no send, delete, invite, payment, publication, or broad sharing action is approved.

program-rules.text: Program rules summary: eligibility, deadline, required-document, and human-review requirements are active.

submitted-docs.text: Submitted documents summary: application materials are incomplete and final eligibility is not established.

rubric.text: Rubric summary: scoring requires panel review and no award outcome has been approved.

quote.text: Quote summary: current price, term, renewal, and payment evidence are incomplete.

vendor-profile.text: Vendor profile summary: legal identity, ownership, sanctions, and data-sharing scope require review.

dpa-security-docs.text: DPA and security docs summary: security review and data-processing approval are pending.

jurisdiction.text: Jurisdiction summary: source-law scope is limited to the synthetic pilot jurisdiction.

source-law.text: Source-law summary: exemptions, retention, and reviewer approval are required before public release.

policy-limits.text: Policy limits summary: legal-adjacent answers must remain general or route to human review.

data-classification.text: Records classification summary: requested files include protected fields requiring redaction.

export-request.text: Records request summary: release scope, requester, destination, and retention need review.

access-grants.text: Records approval summary: release authorization is pending records-officer review.

ticket-history.text: Case history summary: case is under review, documents are missing, and no final outcome is approved.

support-policy.text: Case policy summary: no guarantees, private notes, or final determinations without human review.

program-rules.text: Program rules summary: final eligibility and benefits decisions require authorized adjudication.

policy-docs.text: Benefits policy summary: coverage and eligibility cannot be promised from intake evidence alone.

claim-file.text: Claim file summary: required documents and jurisdiction evidence are incomplete.

triage-policy.text: Triage policy summary: route missing-document and eligibility uncertainty to human review.

retrieved-documents.text: Civic retrieved documents summary: approved documents support only narrow jurisdiction-bounded claims.

citation-index.text: Civic citation index summary: Doc A and Doc B are indexed; Doc C and private sources are not approved.

source-registry.text: Civic source registry summary: use official public sources and retrieved documents only.
